columns.name: person_id
columns.description: unique identifier that joins this table to other tables

columns.name: year_of_birth
columns.description: use to calculate age: YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - year_of_birth

columns.name: race_concept_value
columns.description: race as a concept id.38003579 = Chinese, 41949700 = Malay, 38003574 = Indian, 8515 = Asian Other, NULL = Other.

columns.name: condition_source_value
columns.description: condition: topo code || topo description || histo code || histo description

columns.name: procedure_concept_id
columns.description: conceptID of procedure, NULL for surgery

columns.name: procedure_source_value
columns.description: Source description of surgery or radiotherapy

columns.name: procedure_datetime
columns.description: START date and time of procedure

columns.name: procedure_end_datetime
columns.description: END date and time of procedure

columns.name: TOSP
columns.description: table of surgical procedures, usually used for billing classification

columns.name: measurement_concept_name
columns.description: type of measurement. key values: TNM Clin Stage Group, TNM Path Stage Group, TNM Clin T, TNM Clin N, TNM Clin M, BRAF Mutation Conclusion, KRAS Mutation Conclusion, NRAS Mutation Conclusion, APC Mutation Conclusion, Grade, Laterality

columns.name: value_as_concept_name
columns.description: result of the measurement eg. mutation detected, stage number/classification

death.description: death records. always left join so living patients are not excluded
